nts1.d: Tune into Ghost Notes Worldwide for that post-twilight sound. Night time music of all strains, with blunted R&B and hip hop instrumentals, neo-downtempo productions, slow jams, and hazy dancefloor sounds.

The cult post-rock-electronic band Seefeel return this year with “Sol.Hz”, their first album in 15 years, out Friday May 1st via Warp Records. Sarah Peacock picks out an hour of inspirations in a special guest show.

nts1.n: CHANNELING W/ IVAN SMAGGHE & NATHAN GREGORY WILKINS (R)
The Early Bird Show w/ Jack Rollo & Eliana Glass (Live Session)
SOUP TO NUTS W/ SCARY THINGS & BENTY
PUM PUM POWER HOUR W/ LIL C

nts2.d: Dark Entries reissues archival and contemporary gems that prove to be crucial to our modern idea of bodily music that exists out of time. Electro, italo, cold wave, new beat, house, techno from a one-of-a-kind digger who visits dusty basements to rescue lost tapes.

nts2.n: Kiss Cafe: Time 2 Get Wize w/ Maraschino
nts2.d: Piper Durabo AKA Maraschino serves up an assortment of hyperdelic jams from her NYC HQ

nts2.j: DJ GONORRHEA & DJ诸葛亮 & MC蒙古包

subtle.n: Pattern Recognition w/ R A L L Y
Mid Morning Matters w/ Alfie Danger
Taking the Peel w/ Badly Drawn Banana

subtle.d:
DJ and radio producer TILDA will be live from the studio to kick off your weekend. She’ll cover all corners of electronic music as well as showcasing unmissable new tracks & chatting about motives for the weekend. 

Each month TILDA will be closing the show with a signature mix.

Live & Direct is the show that promises to make you dance and make you laugh, with your fave tunes that make you go 'Rahhh ain't hear this in time' and all the cheesy jokes from me, Hannah :) Lock in for the sickest guests and the most relatable stories about daily slips and hilarious situations I find myself in.

Following his widely acclaimed breakout moment winning the 2013 DMC World Online Championships, Jon1st quickly built an international reputation as a ‘DJ’s DJ’. Not only proving himself as one of the world’s most diverse and musical turntablists, Jon also established himself as an on the pulse club DJ mixing across the alternative bass music spectrum and as an in demand live performer around the world, as well as recording acclaimed guest mixes for everyone from DJ Mag to Boiler Room to Ninja Tune’s Solid Steel to Mary Anne Hobbs to Keep Hush.

Established in 2013, eatmybeat is a hybrid record label & club brand that was brought together by a group of friends with a passion for electronic music and building community. With diverse tastes, they support and champion the underground bass music scene through events and releases on the label. Refusing to be pigeonholed into a specific sound, they showcase everything from hip-hop, bass & breaks, through to techno, jungle, dubstep and grime. As long as it's tasty and full fat, you best believe eatmybeat are snacking on it.
Born in Sunderland, based in London, Kitschko's productions and selections display a deep appreciation of UK club culture, and an affinity for late night, introspective sounds.

As a drummer since childhood, Chacho has always had an insatiable appetite for new and unique beats.
Combining his love of global percussion, dark grooves and deeper low end frequencies, 
his sets feature a blend of dubstep, grime, garage, breaks, hip hop and other flavours from around the world.
Hailing from Belfast but making moves in Nottingham, Nikki O is a DJ and radio presenter whose sets blend 4/4 rhythms, breakbeats, and the bassier side of techno.

DJ & Producer, B-Say has been a Subtle resident DJ for over 3 years.

His radio shows tend to focus on the 140 bass music scene and aims to showcase unreleased/forthcoming music from upcoming artists, as well as premiering his own unreleased material. 

More recently B-Say has ventured out from solely DJ'ing Dubstep, with his bi-monthly 'Dub & Steppers Show' which he uses to premier his own productions.

Slick is a London-based Producer and DJ combining the sounds of Grime and Drill.
Expect sets to span from sparse wave and weightless to classic NY and UK Drill, with everything in between

dublab.n: FROM THE VAULTS: Carlos Niño – SUN RA SPECIAL (03.08.07)
Daddy Differently and Dirty Dave - Things of Life
dublab.d: It’s the simple things isn’t it? The little things of life. Good food, sunshine, no traffic, dark coffee, 72˚ breeze, telephone off the hook and music every Friday morning a la Daddy Differently & Dirty Dave.

dublab.d: “Dying Songs focuses on melancholic electronic music but isn’t limited to that. Sometimes it gets dark, sometimes I try to mix techno awkwardly, sometimes i get nostalgic… I like stuff that’s dreamy, ghostly, pretty and sad. I’ll try out new productions of my own, as well. I’m keeping it pretty open and we’ll see how it evolves.” – Jimmy
